summary: Due to a technicality in the filing of the Notice of Proposed Rulemaking, the Department will be refiling the notice for the regulations referenced below. title: Proposed notice for 2 CCR 601-3
agency: Transportation Commission and Office of Transportation Safety
summary: After further analysis, the Colorado Department of Transportation has decided to terminate this rulemaking proceeding pursuant to section 24-4-103(4)(d), C.R.S. Additional discussion and consideration are warranted regarding the proposed rule revisions. Stakeholders will be notified of any future rulemaking proceedings regarding outdoor advertising in Colorado.
source_evidence: Department of Transportation Transportation Commission and Office of Transportation Safety 2 CCR 601-3 2020-00688 10/14/2020 After further analysis, the Colorado Department of Transportation has decided to terminate this rulemaking proceeding pursuant to section 24-4-103(4)(d), C.R.S. Additional discussion and consideration are warranted regarding the proposed rule revisions. Stakeholders will be notified of any future rulemaking proceedings regarding outdoor advertising in Colorado.
